mapper.sql: select id, convoke_time, address, compere_id, join_id, people_id, title, contents, createtime, updatetime, unit_id,unit_name,compere_ren,people_ji_lu,file_url,meeting_form from bdgl_even
mapper.select: select count(*) from bdgl_even where unit_id = #{unitId} and YEAR(convoke_time)= #{year}
mapper.insert:
insert into bdgl_even
convoke_time, address, compere_id, join_id, people_id, title, contents, createtime, updatetime, unit_id, unit_name, compere_ren, people_ji_lu, file_url, meeting_form,
#{convokeTime}, #{address}, #{compereId}, #{joinId}, #{peopleId}, #{title}, #{contents}, #{createtime}, #{updatetime}, #{unitId}, #{unitName}, #{compereRen}, #{peopleJiLu}, #{fileUrl}, #{meetingForm},
mapper.delete:
delete from bdgl_even where id in
#{id}
